name: anthropic-claude
description: Call the Anthropic Claude API with native tool_use for guaranteed structured output. Requires OUTPUT_SCHEMA (JSON Schema object) to define the output shape. Set API_KEY_SECRET config key to the vault path where your Anthropic API key is stored (canonical path: 'anthropic/api_key').
setup_instructions: 1. Store your Anthropic API key: create_secret {name: 'anthropic/api_key', value: 'sk-ant-...', namespace: 'ai'}
2. Install this module with the vault path: install_module_from_catalog {name: 'anthropic-claude', allowed_secrets: ['anthropic/api_key']}
3. In node config, set API_KEY_SECRET = 'anthropic/api_key' (must match the vault path exactly)
4. Set OUTPUT_SCHEMA to a JSON Schema object string defining the required output shape
Note: If your key is stored at a different vault path, pass that path in the allowed_secrets array at install time and use the same path in API_KEY_SECRET config.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path for the Anthropic API key. Canonical path: 'anthropic/api_key'. Must exactly match the path used when the secret was stored and when the module was installed with allowed_secrets.

MODEL.description: Claude model identifier (e.g. claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001)

OUTPUT_SCHEMA.description: JSON Schema object (as a JSON string) defining the structured output shape. Required — tool_use is always enabled for this template.
